unscVotes.description: Russia-China ceasefire draft. US veto — cited Iran's nuclear threat as ongoing.
Unanimous demand for humanitarian corridors. China abstained.
Extended arms embargo on Iran. Russia and China voted against but did not veto.
Iran-backed resolution condemning strikes. Triple veto by P3 Western members.
Unanimous call for immediate IAEA access restoration to all Iranian nuclear sites.

coalitionPositions.stance: Leading strikes with Israel. Carrier groups deployed. Full sanctions.
RAF operations from Cyprus. Naval support. Intelligence sharing.
Diplomatic support. Not participating in strikes. EU sanctions lead.
Arms export freeze to Iran. Hosting diplomatic back-channels.
Condemns strikes. Arms supply paused. UNSC vetoes for Iran.
Mediation offers. Continues oil purchases via workarounds. UNSC abstentions.
Calls for restraint. Concerned with oil supply disruption.
Opposes strikes. Denies airspace. Hosting refugees. NATO tensions.
Not participating in strikes. Defending oil infrastructure. Quiet coordination.
Hosting US forces at Al Dhafra. Not publicly endorsing strikes.

generalAssembly.description: Non-binding resolution demanding immediate ceasefire. US, Israel, and 7 allies voted against.
